ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicle_classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle class (e.g., car, truck) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vehicle class */,
  "max_speed" REAL /* Maximum speed for the vehicle class */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle class */,
  "average_fuel_efficiency" REAL /* Average fuel efficiency for the vehicle class */,
  "class_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the vehicle class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_engineers" (
  "engineer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each engineer */,
  "engineer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the engineer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the engineer */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the engineer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the engineer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the engineer within the company */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the engineer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engineer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the test location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the test location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the test location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the test location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the test location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the test location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of test location (e.g., indoor, outdoor, lab) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the performance metric */,
  "test_version" TEXT /* Version of the test data associated with the metric */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., sensor, simulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test report */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case the report belongs to */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the test report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the test report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the test report in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "report_version" TEXT /* Version of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed, final) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions assigned to the user (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the test case */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the data (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
